svg.title: Buddies Onchain — terminal OG card (v2, {@,@} face)
svg.desc: 1200x630 social preview. Terminal-frame variant: rounded-rect outline in accent, centered single-row ASCII face {@,@} with a tilde brow over the left eye, Block E tagline inside frame near bottom. Hand-authored SVG; PNG derived via Chromium headless rasterize. Fonts: Iosevka SemiBold (chrome) + DejaVu Sans Mono (sprite, includes ~), WOFF2 subsets base64-embedded for self-contained rendering. Accent #d397f6, surface #0a0818.

g.text: Lives on-chain. No host. No takedown.
